title: Minr Official Modpack
description: A QoL modpack assembled by the staff of the server zero.minr.org using only mods whitelisted for use on our server.
body:
This modpack was assembled by the staff of zero\.minr.org, Minecraft's oldest challenge server, to aid players in navigating our mod whitelist. Due to the unique nature of our server's content, we only allow mods that have been verified by our staff team to be used on our server. If you use this modpack, you can be certain that you will be able to take advantage of the QoL and performance improvements that modded Minecraft has to offer without using any illegal modifications.


**Q: Can I add other mods?** 

A: Yes, but ensure they are on our Mod Whitelist, otherwise you may be prevented from joining the server. ([https://wiki.minr.org/Mod_Whitelist](https://wiki.minr.org/Mod_Whitelist))
